creator: freebsd@centromere.net
text:
Created attachment 165602
Stack trace

FreeBSD 10.2-STABLE #40 r294020
/usr/ports/www/firefox/Makefile:
     $FreeBSD: head/www/firefox/Makefile 405511 2016-01-08 04:17:48Z jbeich $

Firefox crashes intermittently when loading JS-heavy sites (such as logging in to Facebook), and it is difficult to reproduce on-demand. A stack trace is attached. The following compile-time options were enabled:

* DBUS
* DEBUG
* FFMPEG
* GIO
* ALSA
* GTK2

All the rest were disabled.
